---
title: "Material Balances"
author: "DOFPro group"
---

# Introduction

Material balances are the general balance equation applied to mass or moles

## The General Balance Equation

## [Mixers, Divders, and Separators](MixDivideSeparateVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Gotta Keep ‘Em Separated**<br/>*Mixer, Divider, and Separator mole balances*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/pRg1m0_9Psg), [Info Page](MixDivideSeparateVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](40-UnitOpsMixDivSepVisuals.qmd)

## Chemical Reactors

### [Fractional Conversion Reactors](FractionalConversionReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**When You Saw It, What Was the Extent of Your Reaction? Part 1**<br/>*Chemical Reactor Single Reaction, $\xi$ and $f_{\mathrm{A}}$*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/HKYYp5UxwpA), [Info Page](FractionalConversionReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](41-UnitOpsReactPart1Visuals.qmd)

**When You Saw It, What Was the Extent of Your Reaction? Part 2**<br/>*Chemical Reactor Multiple Reactions with Example, $\xi$ and $f_{\mathrm{A}}$*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/XmLXR_KOZMk), [Info Page](FractionalConversionReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](42-UnitOpsReactPart2Visuals.qmd)

**When You Saw It, What Was the Extent of Your Reaction? Part 3**<br/>*Chemical Reactor Yield and Selectivity*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/PPi-ka3iRvI), [Info Page](FractionalConversionReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](42.5-UnitOpsReactPart3Visuals.qmd)

### [Kinetic Reactors](KineticReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**How Did You Think I Would React?**<br/>*Basic Kinetic Reactor Mole Balance*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/_qxHszVZYGk), [Info Page](KineticReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](46-KineticsIntroJTFVisuals.qmd)

**Wishing Upon a CSTR**<br/>*Batch, CSTR, PFR*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/6tnVFq7dSbE), [Info Page](KineticReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](47-BatchCSTRPFRIntroVisuals.qmd)

**It’s Totally Tubular, Man!**<br/>*CSTR, PFR, Batch Example*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/OAzXx9Kq2nU), [Info Page](KineticReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](47.5-ReactorExamplesVisuals.qmd)

### [Equilibrium Conversion Reactors](EquilibriumReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**React But Maintain Your Equilibrium Part 1**<br/>*Basics of equilibrium reactors*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/0GS8XEHRBMk), [Info Page](EquilibriumReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](54-EquilReact1Visuals.qmd)

**React But Maintain Your Equilibrium Part 2**<br/>*Equilibrium reactor example*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/GI8tuSRrIcc), [Info Page](EquilibriumReactorsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](55-EquilReact2Visuals.qmd)

### [Combustion Reactions](CombustionReactionsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Flame On, Torch!**<br/>*Combustion reactions*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/G2sKW_6N2BA), [Info Page](CombustionReactionsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](59-CombRxnsPart1Visuals.qmd)

**A Combustible Mixture!**<br/>*Sample combustion reactions*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/hvIk-evMp88), [Info Page](CombustionReactionsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](60-CombRxnsPart2Visuals.qmd)

## [Process Flowsheets](RecyclingBypassVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Recycling Before Recycling Was Cool**<br/>*Basics of recycle*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/R7tIQyBUWn8), [Info Page](RecyclingBypassVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](43-RecycleBypassPartVisuals.qmd)

**Leaving Radiator Springs In the Dust**<br/>*Basics of bypass and a recycle example*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/tjzDu7_n-NI), [Info Page](RecyclingBypassVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](44-RecycleBypassPart2Visuals.qmd)

**The Symbolic Meaning of Recycling**<br/>*Analytic solution of a recycle PFD*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/CF18jpqZzgc), [Info Page](RecyclingBypassVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](45-RecycleSymbSolVisuals.qmd)

## Properties of Liquids and Gases

### [Liquid Properties](LiquidMixturesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Alcohol and Water DO Mix!**<br/>*Liquid and Solid Density Calculations*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/_tjYMjWR4fE), [Info Page](LiquidMixturesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](61-LiqSolDenJTFVisuals.qmd)

### [Gas Properties](IdealAndRealGasesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Ideal Gases EXPOSED: Are They Even Real?!!**<br/>*Basics of $P V = n R T$*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/L-DEw6dGRps), [Info Page](../material/IdealAndRealGasesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/62-IdealGasVisuals.qmd)

**When Getting Gassed Isn’t Ideal, Part 1**<br/>*Real gas intro*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/1sU4_YdcKr4), [Info Page](../material/IdealAndRealGasesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/63-Visuals.qmd)

**When Getting Gassed Isn’t Ideal, Part 2**<br/>*Real gas example*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/Q6ZK_Ou967o), [Info Page](../material/IdealAndRealGasesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/64-Visuals.qmd)

**REAL Gas Mixtures EXPLAINED – Don’t Let This Cost You Points on Your Exam! Part 1**<br/>*Explanation of Kay's Rule and DWSIM for real gas mixtures*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/yI3jj1jCSAM), [Info Page](../material/IdealAndRealGasesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/65-Visuals.qmd)

**REAL Gas Mixtures EXPLAINED – Don’t Let This Cost You Points on Your Exam! Part 2**<br/>*Example of Kay's Rule and DWSIM for real gas mixtures*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/Pbizi39c1Rk), [Info Page](../material/IdealAndRealGasesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/66-Visuals.qmd)

## Multiphase Equilibria

### [Reading Phase Diagrams](ReadingPhaseDiagramsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Can You Tell an Azeotrope from a Peritectic? Get Your Phase Diagrams Right! Part 1**<br/>*Phase Diagrams, Gibbs Phase Rule*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/NUS4Y_pnWZk), [Info Page](../material/ReadingPhaseDiagramsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/70-IntroMultiphasePart1Visuals.qmd)

**Can You Tell an Azeotrope from a Peritectic? Get Your Phase Diagrams Right! Part 2**<br/>*Ternary Phase Diagrams, Lever Rule*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/QBREikNSvGI), [Info Page](../material/ReadingPhaseDiagramsVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/71-IntroMultiphasePart2Visuals.qmd)

### [Bubble, Dew, and Flash Calculations](RaoultsLawDewBubbleFlashVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**Show Some Flash and Dew the Dew with a Little Bubbly!**<br/>*Graphical BUBL P, DEW P, BUBL T, DEW T, and FLASH calculations*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/shKvpcsJIEM), [Info Page](../material/GraphicalDewBubbleFlashVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/72-BubbleDewFlashVisuals.qmd)

**Oh, Henry!**<br/>*Gas-Liquid Equilibrium with one condensible component*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/dCOQy1C7yf0), [Info Page](../material/HenrysLawVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/73-Visuals.qmd)

**Dew Your Bubbles Have Flash? Part 1**<br/>*Raoult's law, BUBL P, DEW P*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/vSkSRi6HYVQ), [Info Page](../material/RaoultsLawDewBubbleFlashVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/74-Visuals.qmd)

**Dew Your Bubbles Have Flash? Part 2**<br/>*BUBL T, DEW T*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/9GyrfJzg-tg), [Info Page](../material/RaoultsLawDewBubbleFlashVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/75-Visuals.qmd)

**Dew Your Bubbles Have Flash? Part 3**<br/>*FLASH*, *Pxy*, *Txy*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/bG15qQ9gB4c), [Info Page](../material/RaoultsLawDewBubbleFlashVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/75.5-Visuals.qmd)

**Using DWSIM to Create Binary Phase Diagrams**<br/>*DWSIM, Binary Phase Diagrams*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/5NUchIg8q7E), [Info Page](../material/DWSIMBinaryPhaseVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

### [Equilibrium Separation Stages](EqullibriumStagesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd)

**The Shocking Truth About Equilibrium Stages—Are You Doing It Wrong? Part 1**<br/>*Equilibrium Stage Equations*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/bY9fl5DJzmk), [Info Page](../material/EqullibriumStagesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/85-EquilibriumSeparationStages1Visuals.qmd)

**The Shocking Truth About Equilibrium Stages—Are You Doing It Wrong? Part 2**<br/>*Distillation Examples: Binary Phase Diagram, Raoult's law*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/wc6gv7lNtI0), [Info Page](../material/EqullibriumStagesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/86-EquilibriumSeparationStages2Visuals.qmd)

**The Shocking Truth About Equilibrium Stages—Are You Doing It Wrong? Part 3**<br/>*Liquid-Liquid Extraction Example*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/jcChVoELvFo), [Info Page](../material/EqullibriumStagesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../material/86.5-EquilibriumSeparationStages3Visuals.qmd)
